evals.prompt: Write an email to my team announcing we're switching from Jenkins to GitHub Actions for CI/CD
evals.expected_output: A natural-sounding team email about CI/CD migration

evals.prompt: Write the opening paragraph for a blog post about why most startups should use Postgres instead of MongoDB
evals.expected_output: A compelling, human-sounding blog intro with a clear opinion

evals.prompt: Explain to a junior developer why we use dependency injection
evals.expected_output: A clear, conversational explanation without AI buzzwords
